brief: Today's news highlights geopolitical tensions with Trump's Greenland remarks and US-Iran strikes raising oil prices, while climate progress sees European leadership. Papers explore AI world generation, prompt engineering, and EEG-based communication.
news_summary: Geopolitical tensions dominate: Trump's Greenland comments and US-Iran strikes drive oil price jumps, alongside climate progress rankings and AI job displacement risks.
papers_summary: Research papers focus on interactive systems: long-horizon game world generation, an agentic tutor for prompt engineering, and EEG-based imagined speech decoding.

todays_image.caption: Just as Lobophora sp. clings to rocky shorelines, Greenland's strategic value clings to the US while Denmark sees it as an icy afterthought.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
